scripts.build: node ../scripts/ensure-balance-sheet-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-profit-loss-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-cash-flow-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-owner-rental-income-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-rental-bills-dashboard-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-rental-receivable-engine.mjs && tsc
scripts.dev: node ../scripts/ensure-balance-sheet-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-profit-loss-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-cash-flow-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-owner-rental-income-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-rental-bills-dashboard-engine.mjs && node ../scripts/ensure-rental-receivable-engine.mjs && tsx watch src/index.ts
scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/utils/dateOnly.test.ts src/utils/passwordPolicy.test.ts src/financial/accountBalanceSql.test.ts src/services/tenantBackupService.test.ts src/services/payrollLedgerCore.test.ts src/services/contractorFifo.test.ts src/services/transactionJournalPosting.test.ts
